summary.what_built: This module creates a health endpoint to check the database status.
summary.problem: It solves the problem of monitoring database health by providing a simple status check.
summary.risk: The risk level is medium because it relies on accurate database status input and does not handle exceptions.
summary.validation: The code has been reviewed for basic functionality and syntax errors.
summary.on_apply: When the operator clicks Apply, the health check module will be added to the specified path in the repository.
summary.uncertainty: It is uncertain how this will behave under different database conditions or load, so monitoring after deployment is advisable.
